messages.content: rewrite for a wedding blog from the third pov: We also brought out a korovai - the bride and groom both chip off (read bite off in our case) a bit of bread, and whoever comes away with the bigger slice will be the head of the household (Ben won that one).

They also unveiled a korovai at the wedding - a traditional Ukrainian wedding bread. The bride and groom enthusiastically took turns breaking off a piece, or rather, playfully biting off a piece in their case. Everyone eagerly watched as they competed to see who would end up with the larger slice, ultimately determining who would be the head of the household. The victory went to Ben, as he emerged with the larger portion of the bread.

rewrite:In a joyous display of cultural traditions, the couple incorporated the korovai ritual into their wedding ceremony. This age-old tradition holds great significance; as tradition dictates, the one who ends up with the larger slice while taking a bite is believed to become the head of the household. The victory went to Ben, as he emerged with the larger portion of the bread.

Immersed in a celebration of cultural customs, the couple beautifully weaved the time-honored korovai ritual into their wedding ceremony. With heartfelt joy, they embraced the profound meaning behind this ancient tradition. According to folklore, the person who secures the larger portion of the korovai bread following a playful bite is destined to assume the leadership role within their household. And in this enchanting moment, Ben emerged triumphant, his slice boasting a size that bestowed upon him the honor of becoming the head of the future household.
rewrite for a wedding blog in couple of sentences: Tatiana and Ben were so happy and looking at each other with so much love.
Overflowing with sheer happiness, Tatiana and Ben's eyes locked in an enchanting gaze, brimming with an immense and undeniable love.

rewrite for a wedding blog in third pov: We didn't really have a theme, but it ended up being a fairytale glam with all the flower installations and custom made artisian structures to support them.  We sort of went with the flow and the feel of the villa with its beautiful features and backdrops. The flower arrangements were chosen to compliment the surroundings and my dress, of course!

Without a defined theme in mind, the wedding unfolded into a breathtaking spectacle of fairytale glamour, adorned with exquisite flower installations and meticulously crafted artisan structures. Embracing the natural beauty of the villa, every element effortlessly aligned with the enchanting ambiance and picturesque backdrops. The carefully curated floral arrangements were thoughtfully selected to harmonize with both the surroundings and, naturally, the bride's resplendent gown.

rewrite for a wedding blog in third pov: Reception of Tatiana and Ben was magical. Being abroad and getting to spend time with our family and friends.  My dad's speech was just unforgettable - sweet, funny, cute, entertaining and it didn't leave anyone without a tear in their eyes.

The reception of Tatiana and Ben emanated an enchanting ambiance, heightened by the joy of being surrounded by loved ones in a foreign land. The highlight of the evening came with an unforgettable speech delivered by the bride's father, a heartfelt blend of sweetness, humor, and endearing anecdotes that captivated everyone's attention, leaving barely a dry eye in the room.

shorten this text:shorten it: Tatiana Kogan and Benedict James Kennett are different from the typical run-of-the-mill accountants. They thrive on breaking the mold and injecting a dose of excitement into their lives. They love the thrill of planned spontaneity, like booking a vacation without knowing what adventures await them.

Their paths crossed through a dating app, although Ben insists they met through their friends. Their first international trip together took them to the breathtaking Lake Como, where Tatiana couldn't help but envision her dream wedding. Little did Ben know, she had already confided in her friends that he was the one she would marry, even though they had only been dating for three months. However, their journey to happily ever after faced an unexpected obstacle - the arrival of the dreaded Covid pandemic. Like countless other couples, Ben, who prefers taking things slow, had to leap and move in with Tatiana.

Tatiana Kogan and Benedict James Kennett defy the norm as adventurous accountants who thrive on spontaneity. They met through a dating app, or so Ben claims while Tatiana envisions her dream wedding in scenic Lake Como. Despite only dating for three months, Tatiana had already confided in friends that Ben was the one. However, the COVID-19 pandemic forced them to accelerate their relationship as Ben moved in with Tatiana.

With a ring ordered and a meticulously planned trip to Dubai on the horizon, he took charge of the arrangements, leaving Tatiana unaware of his secret intentions. However, fate had other plans, as unexpected circumstances led to multiple failed attempts. Determined, Ben explored alternative options, to make his dream proposal come true in Dubai.Despite the challenges, they eventually found themselves in Lisbon, a city holding a special place in their hearts, as this is where Ben first told me he loved Tatiana. But even there, obstacles arose, with their planned visit to Castelo de S. Jorge being thwarted by its closure. Undeterred, they climbed over the fence and, overlooking the glowing city, Ben finally asked the question that would forever change their lives.

Months later, Ben planned to propose during a trip to Dubai, but unforeseen circumstances led to multiple failed attempts. Determined, he sought alternative options and eventually found themselves in Lisbon, a city dear to their hearts. Despite facing obstacles, such as the closure of Castelo de S. Jorge, Ben took matters into his own hands, scaling the fence and declaring his love to Tatiana. Finally, amidst the radiant cityscape, he asked the life-changing question.
